MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Philip S. Horne, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Diana Padilla, CSR# 9975 (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatory, Set One, And For Sanctions Of $1650.00 Against Deft Lee Under Ccp Sections 2023, 2030 And 2033
Off Calendar Oct-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatory, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $450, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
